title: Part 1: The machine via Next Greater Element

cues.label: The stack
cues.headline: Only unresolved indices
cues.narration: The stack holds only indices whose next-greater is still open, kept decreasing in value.

cues.label: Push a waiter
cues.headline: Smaller arrival just waits
cues.narration: An element that does not beat the top resolves nothing, so you just push its index.

cues.label: Pop resolves
cues.headline: Bigger arrival settles up
cues.narration: When the arrival beats the top value, it is that element's next greater, so pop and record it.

cues.label: Cascade
cues.headline: One arrival, many resolved
cues.narration: Keep popping while the arrival beats the new top — one newcomer can resolve several waiters at once.

cues.label: Leftovers
cues.headline: No greater → default -1
cues.narration: Indices still on the stack at the end were never beaten, so their answer stays negative one.

cues.label: Linear
cues.headline: Push once, pop once
cues.narration: Every index was pushed once and popped at most once, so the whole scan is linear.
